final_prompt.prompt:
Create a still-life photograph of a rustic pottery vase with dried branches on a weathered wooden table (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "侘寂" (wabi-sabi) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include natural light streaming in diagonally from a window
Subject: must include a coarse pottery vase with dried branches
Scene/backdrop: must include a weathered wooden table
Lighting/mood: must be natural light from window, diagonal angle — needs an atmosphere emphasizing imperfect beauty and traces of time
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a textured surface treatment emphasizing imperfection and time-worn quality — exact grain and patina are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
